summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Friends/Social System for The Drop. 21/21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Profile page social features fully functional. Fixed critical bug in NewsCard share button (ReferenceError: rewrite is not defined).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/friends/request returns 404 for non-existent user
Backend: POST /api/friends/request returns 403 for child account (must use invite)
Backend: GET /api/friends returns list with avatar_url, current_streak, knowledge_score
Backend: GET /api/friends/requests returns pending requests with sender info
Backend: GET /api/friends/leaderboard includes self with is_self=true
Backend: GET /api/friends/leaderboard sorted by knowledge score descending
Backend: GET /api/invite/my-link returns invite_url with username
Backend: GET /api/invite/lookup/{username} returns public profile with score and streak
Backend: GET /api/invite/lookup/{username} returns 404 for non-existent user
Backend: GET /api/profile/stats returns correct knowledge_score with rank_label
Frontend: Profile page loads with data-testid='profile-page'
Frontend: Friends section shows Friends/Board/Requests tabs
Frontend: Friends tab shows friend list with avatars, streaks, scores
Frontend: Leaderboard tab shows ranked entries with is_self flag
Frontend: Requests tab shows 'No pending requests' when empty
Frontend: Invite page /join/@hansel loads with inviter info
Frontend: data-testid='invite-signup-btn' navigates to /auth with invitedBy state
Frontend: NewsCard share button visible with data-testid='share-btn-{id}'
Frontend: Share button click does not navigate (e.stopPropagation working)

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Share button onClick used undefined variable 'rewrite' instead of 'rw'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all social features and share button working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test users (Hansel, Zara). They are already friends in the system.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Friends/Social system fully implemented with: (1) Friend search at /api/friends/search excluding child accounts, (2) Friend requests send/accept/decline at /api/friends/request, /api/friends/accept/{id}, /api/friends/decline/{id}, (3) Friends list at /api/friends with stats, (4) Leaderboard at /api/friends/leaderboard with is_self flag, (5) Invite system at /api/invite/my-link, /api/invite/lookup/{username}, /api/invite/connect/{username}, (6) Block at /api/friends/block/{user_id}, (7) Knowledge score batch calculation at /api/knowledge-score/calculate-all. Frontend Profile page has social section with tabs (friends/leaderboard/requests), add friend search modal, invite link copy button. Invite landing page at /join/@username shows inviter info and signup CTA. NewsCard has share button with Web Share API and clipboard fallback. Key data-testids: social-tab-friends, social-tab-leaderboard, social-tab-requests, add-friend-btn, friend-search-input, invite-link-btn, invite-page, inviter-avatar, invite-signup-btn, share-btn-{id}.

mocked_apis.note: Parent confirmation email is mocked (console.log only) but this was pre-existing from signup flow
